author: nc1234
content: <@412614104222531604> looks like deathstar is out of sync. I notice `lodestar-ethrex-1`'s ethrex image is for devnet 5. Is this intentional?

author: nc1234
content: Ethrex rejected the payload of slot 960, causing lodestar to be stuck in that slot

author: 0xunclebill
content: We don’t have stateless block production yet if that’s what the issue is

author: terencechain
content:

                      block_hash=0xf799…2680 block_number=957
  14:43:03.053  INFO  Fork choice updated V4 includes payload attributes. Creating a new payload id=354609145100214379 slot=966 gas_ceil=190000000

author: ivanlitteri
content: Thanks! I'm taking a look at it

author: ivanlitteri
content: The node has recovered, working on a fix right now
